metadata.source: Grade 3 English final writing and language batch

subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Join the Grade 3 Writing Studio team to practice grammar, conventions, and sentence combining.
lesson.objective: I can use Grade 3 strategies for grammar, conventions, and sentence combining.
lesson.concept_explanation: Strong Grade 3 writers plan the parts of grammar, conventions, and sentence combining, choose words that fit, and reread so readers can understand the message.
lesson.common_misconception: A writer may fix one convention but forget to reread the whole sentence.
lesson.real_world_connection: Clear writing helps classmates, families, and teachers understand your ideas in every subject.
lesson.lesson_summary: Plan the parts, write complete sentences, and reread with the checklist.
lesson.mini_lesson: Read the prompt, name the writing job, build the sentence or paragraph, then check your conventions.

worked_examples.text: Watch how a writer uses the model to complete grammar, conventions, and sentence combining before answering.

question_audio.text: Watch how a writer uses the model to complete grammar, conventions, and sentence combining before answering.
question_audio.label: Read Question

hint_ladder: Read the prompt and name the writing job.
Use the visual model to plan the missing part.
Reread for capitals, punctuation, and complete meaning.

guided_practice.prompt: Edit the sentence for capitalization and punctuation: mia reads every night.
hints: Read the prompt and identify the writing job.
Use the visual model to plan your answer.
Reread your answer before you finish.
guided_practice.explanation: This answer matches the Grade 3 writing target and gives the reader enough information.
guided_practice.feedback: Strong writing move — you used the checklist.

story.text: Welcome to this Grade 3 Language mission about Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Listen for the writing goal, notice the visual model, and think about what a reader needs. Press Start Mission when you are ready to plan, answer, and check your work.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This lesson teaches Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Look at the model and name each important part before you answer. Use the checklist to check meaning, order, capitalization, punctuation, and complete sentences. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This watch page shows a worked example for Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Step one is to read the prompt and decide the writing job. Step two is to use the model to plan the answer. Step three is to reread the final answer and explain why it fits. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This demo lets you try Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining with support. Read the sentence or paragraph task first, then use the model to decide what belongs. Check your answer out loud like a careful Grade 3 writer. Press Next when you are ready for practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This practice page helps you try Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Press Read Question to hear the exact prompt before you answer. Use the visual model, write or choose a complete response, and check the sentence for meaning. Answer carefully, then continue.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This challenge page asks you to use Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining with more independence. Press Read Question if you want the prompt read aloud. Think about the purpose, choose details or conventions that fit, and reread before you submit. Answer carefully, then continue.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This checkpoint shows what you can do with Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Press Read Question to hear the task, then use the model and checklist. Check for complete meaning, capitals, punctuation, and any special writing parts. Answer carefully, then continue.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge celebrates your Grade 3 work on Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Think about the strategy you used, such as planning, adding details, using dialogue, combining sentences, or checking punctuation. Press Next to see your profile and keep growing.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows your growth for Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. Look at attempts, correct answers, accuracy, hints, and the recommendation. Continue to Skill Practice for focused review, replay the mission, or go back to the hub.
profile.label: Read This Page
